hero.title: Hi, I’m Dival Sehgal
hero.subtitle: Senior Frontend Engineer — Designing and building scalable frontend systems with a focus on performance, architecture, and clean engineering practices.

about.title: About Me
paragraphs: I'm a Senior Frontend Engineer with 6+ years of experience building performant and scalable web applications.'I specialise in developing data-driven dashboards, multi-brand eCommerce platforms, and media and wellness marketplaces. I focus on creating scalable design systems and optimising frontend performance using real-world analytics and user behaviour insights.'Outside of work, I enjoy hiking, exploring national parks and wildlife sanctuaries, and spending time in nature—it helps me reset and approach complex problems with clarity.'

description.text: Improved the Advisor Dashboard by adding analytics and insights, increasing engagement by 25% through data-driven optimisations.
Rebuilt the Advisor Onboarding flow to improve performance and UX, and integrated Tipalti and Jumio for tax verification.
Optimised support workflows by migrating key pages and integrating a chatbot, improving efficiency by 30% and reducing response time by 20%.
Led the Shukran Delivery project integrating same-day delivery across stores, improving on-time deliveries by 25%.
Enhanced Flash Sales and Recommendation systems, increasing user engagement by 30% across brands.
Revamped location and product listing filters, improving accessibility and discoverability by 20%.
Optimized performance using Lighthouse, reducing load time, CLS, and bounce rate by 20%.
Built a KYC Dashboard for Stanza Living to manage booking workflows across multiple platforms.
Developed an Ad Campaign Dashboard with analytics and automation, improving campaign efficiency.
Designed role-based routing and atomic component architecture for Narayan Edtech platform.
Developed an internal Shuttle Service app with an admin dashboard for ride-sharing, cab booking, and seat allocation.

projects.name: Travel Template Generator
projects.description: A professional web application designed to create, customise, and export structured travel itineraries with a dynamic theme engine and high-fidelity PDF support.

projects.name: Excel Clone
projects.description: Spreadsheet application supporting cell editing, formulas, and formatting with a performant React architecture.

projects.name: RPC Game
projects.description: Real-time multiplayer Rock Paper Scissors game using WebSockets with queue-based matchmaking.

projects.name: Booking Clone
projects.description: Full-stack hotel booking platform with search, filtering, and management features.

projects.name: YT Bookmarker
projects.description: Chrome extension to save and manage YouTube timestamps using browser APIs and IndexedDB.
